title: Bloom Filter assignment — rockyou false-positive run
html:
Terminal output from Yahir's CS Project 2 — a Bloom Filter loaded with the rockyou wordlist (14.3M entries, 137M bits, 6 hash functions); actual false-positive rate 0.01036 against the projected 0.01. Crypto/security course exercise consistent with the same week's buffer overflow and access-control quiz captures.

cs coursework · bloom filter · osu · rockyou wordlist
